title: alter column to set the same constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String NOT NULL, age Int32);
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN name String NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN age Int32 NOT NULL;
